title: Virginia Advances in ACC Tourney with Victory Over NC State
summary: No. 10 Virginia defeats NC State 81-74 for the third time this season in the ACC Tournament. Malik Thomas scored 16 points.
charlotte_impact: Virginia's victory impacts their tournament standing and reflects their consistent performance against NC State.

title: Virginia Secures Win Against NC State, 81-74
summary: Virginia defeats NC State 81-74 in the ACC Tournament, marking their third win against the Wolfpack this season. Thomas led with 16 points.
charlotte_impact: This win solidifies Virginia's position in the ACC Tournament and showcases their strong gameplay.

title: Virginia and NC State Face Off in ACC Tournament Quarterfinals
summary: Virginia plays NC State in the quarterfinal round of the 2026 ACC Tournament in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: This game is a crucial step for both teams in their journey through the ACC Tournament.

title: NC State vs. Virginia: ACC Tournament Odds and Predictions
summary: NC State Wolfpack meet No. 11 Virginia Cavaliers in the ACC Tournament quarterfinal in Charlotte. Tip-off at noon ET.
charlotte_impact: Provides insight into the anticipated outcome and betting odds for the tournament game.

title: W.T. Harris Boulevard Lanes Reopen After Crash
summary: Lanes on W.T. Harris Boulevard in north Charlotte reopen after a crash that closed NC-24 westbound near Mallard Creek Road.
charlotte_impact: The reopening restores traffic flow and reduces congestion for commuters in the area.

title: Woman Found Dead After House Fire in Taylorsville
summary: A 67-year-old woman was found dead inside a home with signs of a fire in Taylorsville, according to the Alexander County Sheriff's Office.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the tragic consequences of house fires and the importance of fire safety.

title: Community Walk Highlights Highway Impacts in McCrorey Heights
summary: Sustain Charlotte organizes a community walk in McCrorey Heights to highlight the neighborhood's history and highway impacts amid I-77 toll lane pushback.
charlotte_impact: Raises awareness about the effects of infrastructure projects on local communities.

title: Deadly Wrong-Way Crash in North Charlotte Claims One Life
summary: A wrong-way crash on Statesville Road near Nevin Glen Road resulted in one fatality and two injuries.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the dangers of reckless driving and the importance of road safety.

title: I-485 Lanes Reopen in South Charlotte After Crashes
summary: Lane closures on the inner and outer loops of I-485 near Providence Road impacted traffic on Wednesday evening but have since reopened.
charlotte_impact: Informs commuters about the resolution of traffic disruptions and the return to normal flow.

title: Cooler Weather Expected Before Weekend Warm-Up
summary: Charlotte experiences cooler weather on Wednesday, with a warm-up expected for the weekend. Dry weather is forecasted for the next week.
charlotte_impact: Provides a weather forecast for the upcoming days, helping residents plan accordingly.

title: Carolina Migrant Network Reports Increase in ICE Traffic Stops
summary: The Carolina Migrant Network reports an increase in ICE traffic stops, from eight calls a week to 15.
charlotte_impact: Highlights concerns about immigration enforcement and its impact on the migrant community.

title: Mother Speaks Out After Son Found Dead in Charlotte
summary: CMPD is investigating the death of a 24-year-old father found in northwest Charlotte. No arrests have been made.
charlotte_impact: Addresses a tragic loss of life and the ongoing investigation into the circumstances.

title: School Safety Threats on the Rise in Charlotte, Cleveland County
summary: Concerns are growing due to recent school threats across the Charlotte area and Cleveland County.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the increasing concerns about school safety and the need for preventative measures.

title: New Investment Brings Hope to West Charlotte Community
summary: CVS Health invests over $2 million to bring resources to Charlotte's historic west end, an area facing economic challenges.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the positive impact of community investment in historically underserved areas.

title: Queens Royals Make NCAA Tournament Debut
summary: Queens University of Charlotte celebrates its men's basketball team's first-ever appearance in the NCAA Men's Basketball Tournament.
charlotte_impact: Showcases the university's achievement and inspires pride within the community.
